mapper.select: SELECT * FROM promotion_links ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO promotion_links ( promote_id, platform, country, promote_name, drama_id, plan_group_id, bean_count, free_episodes, preview_episodes, domain, drama_name, status, stat, amount, spend, target, created_by, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{promoteId}, #{platform}, #{country}, #{promoteName}, #{dramaId}, #{planGroupId}, #{beanCount}, #{freeEpisodes}, #{previewEpisodes}, #{domain}, #{dramaName}, #{status}, #{stat}, #{amount}, #{spend}, #{target}, #{createdBy}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE promotion_links SET promote_id = #{promoteId}, platform = #{platform}, country = #{country}, promote_name = #{promoteName}, drama_id = #{dramaId}, plan_group_id = #{planGroupId}, bean_count = #{beanCount}, free_episodes = #{freeEpisodes}, preview_episodes = #{previewEpisodes}, domain = #{domain}, drama_name = #{dramaName}, status = #{status}, stat = #{stat}, amount = #{amount}, spend = #{spend}, target = #{target}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM promotion_links WHERE id IN
#{id}
